docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EKE, EDDY C/O CHARLES SCOTT MANAGER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,248.30 FILED BY OGBONNAM, CHUCKS ALOYSIUS AS TO DEFENDANT EKE, EDDY C/O CHARLES SCOTT MANAGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH SETLEMENT NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 04/10/00 AT 10AM, COURT WILL CON'T FOR AN ADDITIONAL 4 MONTHS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-10-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-14-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 8/14/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-31-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-10-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OGBONNAM, CHUCKS ALOYSIUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EKE, EDDY C/O CHARLES SCOTT MANAGER $948.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $968.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
